privacy.title: Your privacy
privacy.p1: Your document is sent to Google Gemini to create the explanation.
privacy.p2: Nothing is stored. It is processed once and then discarded — no account, no history, and we do not log its contents.
privacy.p3: This explanation is an aid, not official or legal advice.
privacy.warning: This demo uses Google's free Gemini tier, which may use submitted data to improve Google's products. Please don't upload real sensitive documents yet — use the sample documents for now.

home.tagline: Understand your official letters in plain language.
home.privacyNote: Nothing you upload is stored. Your document is read once to explain it, then discarded.

review.readingSub: This usually takes a few seconds.
review.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
review.errorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and that the backend is running.
review.empty: No pages yet. Add a photo or PDF below to get started.

ask.title: Ask a question
ask.placeholder: e.g. What happens if I miss the deadline?
ask.error: Couldn't answer that. Please try again.

share.error: Couldn't create the PDF. Please try again.
share.unavailable: Sharing isn't available on this device.
